name: HiveMQ
description: HiveMQ — Enterprise MQTT broker for IoT deployments with clustering, persistence, and Kafka integration.

seo.title: HiveMQ — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: HiveMQ: HiveMQ — Enterprise MQTT broker for IoT deployments with clustering, persistence, and Kafka integration.

when_to_use: Enterprise MQTT broker with clustering for high-availability IoT
Kafka integration bridge from MQTT devices to streaming pipeline
MQTT broker for 1M+ concurrent device connections
Persistent messaging for industrial IoT and smart metering
MQTT 5.0 compliant broker with advanced security controls

review.verdict: The go-to enterprise MQTT broker when uptime, Kafka bridging, and support SLAs matter.
review.best_for: Enterprise IoT and connected-car fleets needing MQTT plus Kafka
review.not_for: Small projects that could live on Mosquitto or a cheap managed broker

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier; no explicit peak-lock or reserved-capacity evidence.
